metadata.description: Sentinel Scheduled Analytics Rule — Network Security Group rule modifications. MITRE Defense Evasion (T1562). Attackers commonly weaken NSG rules to allow lateral movement or exfiltration paths; legitimate ops can do the same — context matters.

properties.description: Detects successful Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/securityRules operations. Reviewer must validate the source/destination/port change aligns with approved change tickets.
properties.query:
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where OperationNameValue has "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/securityRules"
| where ActivityStatusValue == "Success"
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, OperationNameValue, ResourceId
